verdict: The chart features flawless foot alternation and perfect timing, but it is far too dense and complex for an Easy difficulty, featuring long continuous streams and tricky syncopated eighth notes.

issues.problem: Syncopated eighth-note steps (placed on offbeats) at 151 BPM are too rhythmically complex and fast for beginners on an Easy chart.
There is a continuous quarter-note stream lasting nearly 26 seconds (over 60 steps) with no breaks, which is exhausting and mentally overwhelming for an Easy difficulty level.
